untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit implied volatility calculation and divisor-based expected move computations (÷16 daily, ÷7.2 weekly) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires monitoring theta decay against a specific threshold [THRESHOLD_NEEDED], which requires options-specific Greeks not in the allowed indicators. hvol_20 and atr_14 are used as proxies for volatility but do not replicate the exact Natenberg methodology.
translation_notes: This is a volatility-based signal from Natenberg's option pricing work requiring custom volatility calculations. Entry conditions use historical volatility as a proxy for IV. Exit uses ATR as a proxy for expected move magnitude. The divisor method (IV/16 for daily, IV/7.2 for weekly) and theta monitoring cannot be accurately translated with available indicators. Confidence bands (2 in 3 = ±2.75 moves, 1 in 20 = ±5.50 moves) are approximated via ATR thresholds.
